blocks.text: Match preview: Namibia Women face Uganda Women in 3rd Match (T20) on Wed, 22 Jul, 2026, 1:00 pm at High Performance Oval Windhoek. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: Women's T20I Quadrangular Series in Namibia 2026

blocks.text: Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Clear sky · High 22°C / Low 8°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 22 km/h. Dry conditions expected — good for batting if the pitch is true.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
